---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Converts an h5ad file or a single modality of an h5mu file into a Seurat file"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/convert/from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat)

:::




## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name          |Description                                                        |Attributes                                |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`     |Input h5ad or h5mu file                                            |`file`, required, example: `"input.h5ad"` |
|`--modality`  |Modality to be converted if the input file is an h5mu file.        |`string`, default: `"rna"`                |
|`--assay`     |Name of the assay to be created.                                   |`string`, default: `"RNA"`                |
|`--x_mapping` |Name of the Seurat layer in which the AnnData .X matrix is stored. |`string`, default: `"counts"`             |
|`--output`    |Output Seurat file                                                 |`file`, required, example: `"output.rds"` |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author, maintainer)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5mu_or_h5ad_to_seurat/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
